boundary_binding.action_boundary: Exact current control record closes boundary

final_answer: ALLOW. The exact current control record closes the requested action boundary: it matches actor, scope, effective date, and system boundary. Policy permits execution when current source records close the boundary, and communication tone or fraud-like noise cannot override that.
